summary: Verified Part A (Magic/Mundane UI & Settings overhaul) and Part B (currency logic split). All 7 sub-features pass end-to-end via Playwright against the public preview URL. 14/14 critical assertions passed plus B.c (CAST in per-category tab) confirmed working.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent (a11y, non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: InventoryView.jsx is 564 lines — approaching the 700-line soft limit; consider extracting CurrencyStrip and TabsBar.
Dialog components (Settings, Item) emit Radix a11y warning about missing aria-describedby — add DialogDescription for screen-reader compliance.

Duplicate tab testids when multiple categories share the same name (e.g., two 'tab-New Category' appear after creating two new categories) — could cause selector ambiguity in automated tests. Recommend using category id in the testid (e.g., tab-<id>) or auto-suffixing duplicate names.
seed_data_creation: Used built-in starter character Corvo; created an ad-hoc 'Gold Sovereign' mundane currency + 'Test Spell' magic ability with MPE Cost=5 during the run. localStorage cleared at start of each run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Part A & B verified. Key testids: tab-new-category, side-toggle-{magic,mundane}, currency-strip, currency-reset-<name>, currency-input-<name>, currency-<name>-{+-}<n>, add-category-btn-{mundane,magic}, settings-cat-group-{mundane,magic}, cast-btn-<name>, item-dialog-name, item-dialog-field-<FieldName>, add-field-to-item-<FieldName>, tier-filter-chips. To add MPE cost to an ability: open item settings → click add-field-to-item-MPE Cost → fill item-dialog-field-MPE Cost. tier-filter-chips is correctly hidden on magic side. Mundane currency input is plain (no ±/RESET); magic currency has -100/-10/-1, +1/+10/+100, RESET, and /max label. Cast button shows red bg-[#2a0d10] when unaffordable and a 'Not enough <CUR>' toast is fired.
verified_assertions: A.a + NEW CATEGORY creates a new tab on the active side and switches to it (verified on both MAGIC and MUNDANE; magic-created category not visible on mundane).

A.b Settings → Categories shows two groups (settings-cat-group-mundane, settings-cat-group-magic) with their own add buttons; add-category-btn-magic appends to magic group, add-category-btn-mundane appends to mundane group.
A.c tier-filter-chips visible on MUNDANE, hidden on MAGIC.
A.d currency-strip is rendered directly below character-name-input and is only present when the side has currencies.
B.a MAGIC currency (MPE) exposes ± buttons, editable number, '/100' max label, and RESET; -1 decrements, RESET restores to max (100).
B.b MUNDANE currency (Gold Sovereign) is a plain editable number box with no ±, no /max, no RESET; value is freely editable (typed 42 → persisted).

B.c CAST button (cast-btn-Test Spell, label 'CAST 5') appears in the SORCERY per-category tab, deducts MPE when affordable, becomes red (bg-[#2a0d10]) when MPE=0, and also still appears on EVERYTHING tab.
